rationale: Abstract Y is better calibrated in its conclusion, hedging with 'reconsideration of routine aspirin use' rather than 'support omitting aspirin' given that only 1 of 5 included studies was an RCT.
loser_weakness: Abstract X overstated certainty in its conclusion by framing a predominantly observational meta-analysis as supporting a specific clinical action (omitting aspirin) without adequately qualifying the evidence base.
